title.purpose: The single application title. Do not use hero-scale display type.

body.purpose: Forms, labels, metadata, and status text for repeated task use.

rules: Animate opacity and transform for UI feedback.
Do not animate width, height, padding, or margin.

componentRules.progress: Use transform: scaleX() for the fill. Keep progress text separate from the visual bar.
componentRules.jobControls: Pause is enabled only while running. Continue is enabled only while paused. Terminate is disabled after cancelling, done, failed, or cancelled states.
componentRules.systemMetrics: Show measured CPU, RAM, and load. Show GPU as Metal active, not numeric GPU percent.
